title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code reviews AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy, a tool demonstrating iterative self-improvement applied to software development. The video explains how AutoResearch uses simulation and self-improvement cycles as a novel approach to software engineering and development optimization.
